VERIFICATION

Verification is intended to assist maintainers and reviewers in verifying that the bundled NSSM binary is trustworthy.

Bundled component: NSSM - the Non-Sucking Service Manager
Pinned package version: 2.24.101.20180116
Vendored repository path: worker/third_party/nssm/win64/nssm.exe
Vendored binary checksum type: SHA256
Vendored binary checksum: EEE9C44C29C2BE011F1F1E43BB8C3FCA888CB81053022EC5A0060035DE16D848
Bundled binary path inside the Windows worker package: tools/nssm/nssm.exe
Provenance reference archive: https://www.nssm.cc/ci/nssm-2.24-101-g897c7ad.zip
Provenance archive checksum type: SHA256
Provenance archive checksum: 99F5045FFFBFFB745D67FE3A065A953C4A3D9C253B868892D9B685B0EE7D07B8

How to verify manually:
1. Compute the SHA256 checksum of `worker/third_party/nssm/win64/nssm.exe` using Get-FileHash or another trusted checksum tool.
2. Confirm the checksum matches the vendored binary checksum in this file.
3. During package verification, confirm the Windows worker bundle contains `tools/nssm/nssm.exe`, `tools/nssm/LICENSE.txt`, and `tools/nssm/VERIFICATION.txt`.
4. For provenance review, compare the vendored binary against the original `win64/nssm.exe` from the reference archive above when that upstream source is available.

License archive source:
- This LICENSE.txt is archived from the Chocolatey community package source for NSSM.
- Source reference: https://github.com/chocolatey-community/chocolatey-packages/tree/main/automatic/nssm/legal/License.txt
- Upstream license reference noted by Chocolatey: https://git.nssm.cc/?p=nssm.git;a=blob;f=README.txt;h=12db7e88a4cd83edb7023b2b92e7d3d5eabf1175;hb=HEAD#l882
